title: Chapter 45: The New System
content: Roxanne faced the First Seat in the middle of the quad.
The First Seat's form had fully materialized now. It was a figure of absolute darkness, edged with violet light, standing fifteen feet tall. Behind it, the eyes in the sky watched. All of them.
"You have no card," the First Seat said. "No infinite wealth. No contract. You are a mortal with nothing."
"You keep saying that like it matters."
"It matters because you are nothing without the card."
Roxanne smiled.
"I was nothing before the card too. A student with debt and a dead phone. But I learned something in the last six months."
"What?"
"The card wasn't power. It was proof. Proof that a different system existed. And now that system is back."
She spread her arms.
"The Void is restored. The original contract is active. Every entity in the Nether-Grid can see it. You can't un-collapse what's been rebuilt."
The First Seat stepped forward. The ground cracked beneath its feet.
"I will collapse it again."
"You can try. But you're alone now. The Council is against you. The 11th Layer can't enforce a dead contract. And I — "
She paused.
"I have something better than infinite money."
"What?"
"A system that doesn't need it."
Behind her, the Executor stepped forward. Silas followed. Frost. Kallos. The Seventh Seat's light descended from the sky.
And from the distance, the refugees began to emerge from their shelters. Not to fight. To watch. To witness.
"You see them?" Roxanne said. "They're not afraid of you. They've seen worse. They've survived worse. And they're still here."
The First Seat looked at the gathered crowd.
Then it looked at Roxanne.
"You have changed nothing. The system will rebuild itself. Debt will return. Enforcement will resume. It always does."
"Maybe. But not today. And not while I'm here."
She took a step forward. Empty-handed. Without the card.
"And I'm not going anywhere."
*End of Act 2*
